propositions: The gating test suite runs serially and dominates the build-and-test job at ~22 minutes.
Running pytest with pytest-xdist parallel workers (-n --dist worksteal) yields ~5x speedup with identical pass/skip outcomes.
Coverage under pytest-xdist requires parallel = true in [tool.coverage.run], otherwise the combined TOTAL is deflated below fail_under and leaks .coverage.* files.
Worker count must be pinned to the runner's real vCPU count (-n4 ubuntu, -n3 macos) rather than -n auto to avoid over-subscription and a coverage SQLite combine race.
Only non-live integration tests are xdist-safe; live Jira tests share one project and flake under parallel load and must stay serial or be xdist_group-confined.
docs/coverage.md must document the xdist plus parallel=true coverage-combine requirement to satisfy the parent epic AC-3.
